title: anathallis puttemansii
intro: Anathallis puttemansii, also known as the Putteman's Anathallis, is a species of orchid that belongs to the family Orchidaceae. This plant is rich in medicinal properties, particularly in flavonoids and phenolic compounds, which have been found to exhibit antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory activities. The health benefits of Anathallis puttemansii include its potential to treat various ailments such as fever, respiratory issues, and digestive problems, due to its antipyretic, expectorant, and carminative properties. The herbal preparations of Anathallis puttemansii typically involve the use of its leaves and stems, which can be dried and made into teas, infusions, or tinctures for medicinal purposes.
